text: @kipmurkomen @kipmurkomen, thieves are terrorizing the city & slowly turning this Country into a Ghost Town yet wewe hapa all you do is run your mouth & yap all day about Gachagua who is busy doing uniting his People? Who bewitched us as Kenyans for us to have such a hopeless CS aki? 🤷‍♂️ 🤔
